csharpCode: using UnityEngine; using UnityEditor; using UnityEngine.SceneManagement; public class Script { public static string Main() { var scene = SceneManager.GetActiveScene(); var roots = scene.GetRootGameObjects(); string r = ""; foreach (var go in roots) { var grid = go.GetComponentInChildren<Match3.GameGrid>(); if (grid != null) { var ic = go.GetComponentInChildren<Match3.InputController>(); if (ic == null) { go.AddComponent<Match3.InputController>(); EditorUtility.SetDirty(go); r += "Added InputController to " + go.name; } else { r += "InputController already on " + go.name; } } } if (r == "") r = "GameGrid not found in scene"; return r; } }
